channel.title: Docs on dusk.li
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on dusk.li

item.title: dusk.li Overview
item.description: What is dusk.li? Dusk.li is a website that rates websites based on their accessibility in terms of their support for Dark Mode. 5049 websites in the datastore. Last updated: 2026-04-03. What is Dark Mode? Dark mode is defined by the Bureau of Internet Accessibility as follows: Dark modes and themes are extremely popular and they’re frequently touted as an accessibility solution. While the term “dark mode” can have different meanings for different developers, the basic idea is simple: Instead of displaying dark-colored text over a light background, a dark mode inverts the color scheme to display light-colored text over a dark background.

item.title: dusk.li Site Catalogue
item.description: The List 5049 websites in the datastore. Last updated: 2026-04-03. Know a site that should be here, or think a listing needs updating? Request a Review (opens GitHub, new tab) Search all columns Websites rated for dark mode and colour contrast accessibility URL Dark Mode All Auto Manual None Contrast All PASS FAIL BLOCKED Score Last Reviewed https://0123tt.ru (opens in new tab) None PASS 1/3 2026-03-31 https://0xrpc.io (opens in new tab) None PASS 1/3 2026-03-30 https://123rf.

item.title: Hall of Fame
item.description: Recognising the sites that get it right. These are the top performers in the dusk.li catalogue for dark mode support and colour contrast accessibility. 71 Perfect score (3/3) 78 Auto dark mode 4849 Pass contrast check 96% Contrast pass rate Champions — perfect score 71 sites with a perfect accessibility score (3/3). Sites with a perfect accessibility score (3/3) URL Dark Mode Contrast Score Last Reviewed https://adguard.com (opens in new tab) Auto PASS 3/3 2026-03-31 https://adweek.

item.title: Hall of Shame
item.description: The sites that still have work to do. These are the lowest scorers in the dusk.li catalogue for dark mode support and colour contrast accessibility. 184 Score of zero (0/3) 4791 No dark mode 0 Contrast FAIL 0 Contrast BLOCKED Most common failings No dark mode support: 4791 of 5049 sites (95%) Contrast FAIL: 0 of 5049 sites (0%) Contrast BLOCKED: 0 of 5049 sites (0%) Zero score (no dark mode & failing contrast): 0 of 5049 sites The worst offenders — no dark mode & failing contrast All sites with a score of 0/3 All sites rated 0/3 URL Dark Mode Contrast Score Last Reviewed http://canali.
